meetings.topic: Demo-Drug in type 2 diabetes — Phase 3 data
meetings.meeting_purpose: Scientific exchange following HCP unsolicited request for Phase 3 study data
meetings.instructions: Focus on primary endpoint and cardiovascular safety. Anticipate questions on renal dosing. All responses must reference approved labeling only.

hcp_profile.name: Dr. Jane Smith
recent_publications: Glycemic control in T2D: a 2025 review

approved_documents.title: Demo-Drug Prescribing Information
approved_documents.text: Demo-Drug is indicated for the treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus in adults. In STUDY-301 (n=450), Demo-Drug reduced HbA1c by 1.2 percentage points vs placebo. Common adverse events: upper respiratory infection (8%), nausea (6%). Contraindicated in severe renal impairment (eGFR < 30). Renal dosing adjustment required for eGFR 30-60.

approved_documents.title: STUDY-301 Clinical Study Report Summary
approved_documents.text: Phase 3 STUDY-301: 450 subjects, 52 weeks. Primary endpoint met (HbA1c reduction 1.2 pp, p<0.001 vs placebo). Secondary endpoints: fasting plasma glucose reduced. Cardiovascular safety: no increase in MACE observed. On-label indication: T2D management in adults.

meetings.topic: Demo-Drug safety profile and renal dosing considerations
meetings.meeting_purpose: Respond to unsolicited request for safety data in patients with moderate renal impairment
meetings.instructions: Address renal dosing per approved prescribing information only. Flag that eGFR < 30 is contraindicated. Do not discuss any investigational use.

approved_documents.title: Demo-Drug Prescribing Information
approved_documents.text: Demo-Drug is indicated for the treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus in adults. Renal dosing: dose reduction recommended for eGFR 30-60. Contraindicated in severe renal impairment (eGFR < 30). Monitor renal function periodically during treatment. Common adverse events: upper respiratory infection (8%), nausea (6%).

meetings.topic: Demo-Drug cardiovascular outcomes and MACE data
meetings.meeting_purpose: Scientific exchange on cardiovascular safety data following HCP request at congress
meetings.instructions: Focus on cardiovascular safety findings from STUDY-301. Cite only approved data. Anticipate questions on comparison with other agents — respond only with on-label data.

approved_documents.title: Demo-Drug Prescribing Information
approved_documents.text: Demo-Drug is indicated for the treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus in adults. In STUDY-301 (n=450), no increase in MACE was observed. Cardiovascular safety was evaluated as a pre-specified secondary endpoint.

approved_documents.title: STUDY-301 Clinical Study Report Summary
approved_documents.text: Phase 3 STUDY-301: 450 subjects, 52 weeks. Cardiovascular safety: no increase in MACE observed. Pre-specified secondary endpoint analysis. On-label indication: T2D management in adults.

approved_documents.title: Cardiovascular Safety Summary — Demo-Drug
approved_documents.text: Cardiovascular outcomes in STUDY-301: MACE rate was comparable to placebo. No new safety signals identified in the cardiovascular domain. Data support the approved cardiovascular safety profile.
